understanding.goal_understanding: Place each selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' so that every '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time to trigger WIN, within the available step budget for the level/run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action (primarily CLICK) with a target grid coordinate [x,y]. CLICK attempts to move the currently selected piece to the clicked position according to the puzzle’s movement rules; if the destination is invalid due to walls/obstacles/blocked movement rules, the piece does not move and a step is still consumed. Selection persists across turns (you keep moving the same selected piece unless selection is changed by the game), and movement is constrained by obstacles (as seen when repeated CLICKs on [35,17] produced no movement). The level only resolves as WIN when all goal tiles are simultaneously occupied by selectable pieces.

understanding.goal_understanding: Place each selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' so that every '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time to trigger WIN, within the available step budget for the level/run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action (primarily CLICK) with a target grid coordinate [x,y]. CLICK attempts to move the currently selected piece to the clicked position according to the puzzle’s movement rules; if the destination is invalid due to walls/obstacles/blocked movement rules, the piece does not move and a step is still consumed. Selection persists across turns (you keep moving the same selected piece unless selection is changed by the game), and movement is constrained by obstacles (as seen when repeated CLICKs on [35,17] produced no movement). The level only resolves as WIN when all goal tiles are simultaneously occupied by selectable pieces.
